free_text: EBR-II derived fission yields from vanadium
resolution calibrated Ge(Li) detectors, was used for
analysis of most spectral dosimeters as well as
counting results for 137Cs were used only to check
the Cs separation values because large corrections
required on the direct counting data. Destructive
analysis was performed to determine the 137Cs content,
target elemental composition and the stable Nd
isotopes. Cesium was separated and counted in NaI(Tl)
BP: Corrected information, added Nd data,
updated the entry to new date formats.
